summary: Iteration 189: Tested 4 targeted fixes based on production data. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend /monitor page shows backfill button and result card working correctly. Vendor maturity labels correctly updated to autonomous/stable/developing/learning/novice.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/posting-patterns/intelligence/backfill endpoint correctly returns escalation_backfill, duplicate_backfill, vendor_maturity, duplicate_clear results
Vendor maturity labels correctly changed from mastered/proficient to autonomous/stable/developing/learning/novice
Intelligence Maintenance scheduler running every 2h for duplicate clearing + escalation backfill + duplicate outcome backfill
Frontend backfill button (data-testid='backfill-btn') works and shows result card with all 4 metrics
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 189 tested 4 production-data-driven fixes: (1) Enhanced PO matching with reverse vendor lookup, substring matching, bigram similarity. (2) Background scheduler for duplicate intelligence clearing + escalation/duplicate backfill every 2h. (3) Fixed vendor maturity labels (autonomous/stable instead of mastered/proficient). (4) On-demand backfill API + UI button. All working correctly.

backend_endpoints: POST /api/posting-patterns/intelligence/backfill - PASS (returns escalation_backfill, duplicate_backfill, vendor_maturity, duplicate_clear)
scheduler_verification: Intelligence Maintenance scheduler started (dup clear + escalation + dup backfill, interval: 2h) - VERIFIED in logs
